<!-- Persistent habitat behavior changes must satisfy the executable behavior contract. -->

## Behavior invariants

- [ ] Habits require multiple sessions and contexts.
- [ ] Same-session repetition cannot strengthen a habit twice.
- [ ] Anticipated response is visible before commitment.
- [ ] Resistance has mechanical consequences but preserves essential care.
- [ ] Behavior changes future `CompanionBrain.current_intention`.
- [ ] Habit, orientation and conflict state persist atomically.
- [ ] No hidden recommendation or random refusal was introduced.

## Evidence

- [ ] `Habitat Behavior Gate`
- [ ] mutation sabotage suite
- [ ] Godot cross-session runtime suite
- [ ] full Xogot CI
- [ ] responsive visual capture
